calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-13-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of Two Minors.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Alfonso Ortiz was present in pro per as Guardian ad Litem for the minors, Cynthia Ortiz Licea and Eric Ortiz Licea.
Esmeralda Cazarez, the minors' mother, was present, placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minors to: Cynthia OrtizLicea and Eric OrtizLicea.

Decree Changing Names was submitte to and signed by the Court.
